option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
#!/usr/bin/env python3 """ Script de test pour vérifier le RAG Service """ import sys import os sys.path.insert(0, os.path.dirname(os.path.dirname(os.path.abspath(__file__))))
print(" Test du RAG Service") print("=" * 60)
# Test 1: Import du service print("\n1️⃣ Test des imports...") try: from app.services.rag_service import RAGService from app.schemas.article import RAGRequest, RAGResponse print(" ✅ Imports RAG OK") except Exception as e: print(f" ❌ Erreur import: {e}") sys.exit(1)
# Test 2: Instanciation print("\n2️⃣ Test de l'instanciation...") try: rag = RAGService() print(" ✅ RAGService instancié") except Exception as e: print(f" ❌ Erreur instanciation: {e}") sys.exit(1)
# Test 3: Test de la méthode (sans DB) print("\n3️⃣ Test de la structure...") try: # Vérifier que les méthodes existent assert hasattr(rag, 'generate_answer') assert hasattr(rag, '_generate_summary') assert hasattr(rag, '_format_sources') print(" ✅ Méthodes RAG présentes") except Exception as e: print(f" ❌ Erreur structure: {e}") sys.exit(1)
# Test 4: Test des schemas print("\n4️⃣ Test des schemas Pydantic...") try: request = RAGRequest(query="test", top_k=5) print(f" ✅ RAGRequest: {request}")
# Test response (mock) from app.schemas.article import ArticleSource source = ArticleSource( id=1, rank=1, title="Test", excerpt="Test excerpt", url="/articles/1", relevance_score="Top 1" ) response = RAGResponse( query="test", summary="Test summary", sources=[source], num_sources=1 ) print(f" ✅ RAGResponse: query='{response.query}', {response.num_sources} sources") except Exception as e: print(f" ❌ Erreur schemas: {e}") sys.exit(1)
print("\n" + "=" * 60) print(" Tous les tests passent!") print("\n Pour tester avec une vraie requête, lance l'API:") print(" python -m uvicorn app.main:app --reload") print(" puis POST http://localhost:8000/rag")
